rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the core conceptual mismatch between claims and evidence, proposes specific reframing, and ties it to load-bearing concepts.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty about training and feedback loops but doesn't mark confidence for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within scope, addressing each part of the requested critique without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns like unsupported claims in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced but minor edits lack annotation.
